steps.action: Run unit tests for error mapping functions
steps.expected: 17 unit tests pass validating all error code mappings
steps.observed: All 17 unit tests passed - test_map_401_to_auth_failed, test_map_429_spike_limit, test_map_429_share_limit, test_map_413_payload_too_large, test_map_500_server_error, test_map_502_bad_gateway, test_map_network_error_connection_refused, test_map_network_error_timeout, test_map_network_error_dns, and 9 additional tests

steps.action: Run integration tests with wiremock for HTTP error responses
steps.expected: 6 integration tests pass validating CLI displays actionable messages
steps.observed: All 6 integration tests passed using wiremock to simulate error responses

steps.expected: Returns 'Authentication failed. Run `spikes login` to refresh your token.'
Returns 'Share has reached spike limit. Upgrade at https://spikes.sh/pro'
steps.observed: test_429_spike_limit_shows_upgrade_message: stderr contains exact message with upgrade URL

steps.expected: Returns 'You've reached the free tier limit (5 shares). Delete a share or upgrade at https://spikes.sh/pro'
steps.observed: test_429_share_limit_shows_limit_message: stderr contains exact message with limit details and upgrade URL

steps.expected: Returns 'Files too large. Max size is 50MB. Consider removing large assets.'
steps.observed: test_413_shows_payload_too_large_message: stderr contains exact message with file size limit

steps.expected: Returns 'Server error. Please try again in a moment or contact support if it persists.'
steps.observed: test_500_shows_server_error_message: stderr contains exact message with retry guidance

steps.expected: Returns 'Server error. Please try again in a moment or contact support if it persists.'
steps.observed: test_502_shows_server_error_message: stderr contains server error message (5xx class handled uniformly)

steps.expected: Returns 'Connection failed. Check your internet connection.' for connection refused, timeout, DNS errors

errorMappings.cliMessage: Authentication failed. Run `spikes login` to refresh your token.
Share has reached spike limit. Upgrade at https://spikes.sh/pro
You've reached the free tier limit (5 shares). Delete a share or upgrade at https://spikes.sh/pro
Files too large. Max size is 50MB. Consider removing large assets.
Server error. Please try again in a moment or contact support if it persists.
Server error. Please try again in a moment or contact support if it persists.
Connection failed. Check your internet connection.

frictions.description: assert_cmd::Command::cargo_bin is deprecated, migration to cargo::cargo_bin_cmd! recommended for custom build-dir compatibility
frictions.resolution: Non-blocking deprecation warning; tests pass correctly

summary: Successfully validated CLI Pull/Push actionable error messages (VAL-REL-017). All required error mappings tested and confirmed working: 401, 429 SPIKE_LIMIT, 429 SHARE_LIMIT, 413, 500, 502, and network errors. 23 tests passed (17 unit + 6 integration). Error mapping functions located in cli/src/error.rs with comprehensive test coverage in cli/tests/http_errors.rs.
